title: Kord Breach
disclaimer: Modifier values may change before the start of the season for balancing reasons.
personalRule: Positive and negative traits that apply only to your character. Each modifier has a point cost. To create a character, the total points must be 0 or higher.

global.name: Black Division
global.description: Black Division operatives can be encountered on specific locations

global.name: No FIR for Hideout
global.description: Hideout zones don't require the Found In Raid status

global.name: Armor Shortage
global.description: Traders across Tarkov are experiencing an armor shortage

global.name: Handyman
global.description: Item crafting time is reduced by 50%. Crafting skill starts at level 51

global.name: Seasoned PMCs
global.description: Your character gains 25% more raid experience

personalPositive.name: Marathon Runner
personalPositive.description: Arm and leg stamina is consumed 15% slower

personalPositive.name: Safecracker
personalPositive.description: Mechanical keys have a 20% chance not to lose durability when used

personalPositive.name: Bushborne
personalPositive.description: Walking in vegetation generates 50% less noise and movement slowdown

personalPositive.name: Juice Time
personalPositive.description: Consuming a juice drink grants the Painkiller effect for 60 seconds

personalPositive.name: Sailor's Nostalgia
personalPositive.description: Consuming canned fish grants the Health Regeneration (+2) effect for 10 seconds

personalPositive.name: Youth
personalPositive.description: Energy is consumed 20% slower. Arm and leg stamina is increased by 10

personalPositive.name: Street Tax
personalPositive.description: Once per week, some Scavs pay you protection money

personalPositive.name: The Tarkov Shooter
personalPositive.description: Bolt-action Rifles skill leveling speed is increased by 100%. Bolt-action Rifles skill starts at level 10

personalPositive.name: Hercules
personalPositive.description: Strength and Endurance skills start at level 15

personalPositive.name: Sturdy Bones
personalPositive.description: Limb fracture chance is decreased by 15%. Falling from heights deals 15% less damage

personalPositive.name: Average
personalPositive.description: All character skills start at level 25 but cannot be increased further (Excluding Crafting)

personalNegative.name: Osteoporosis
personalNegative.description: Limb fracture chance is increased by 15%. Falling from heights deals 15% more damage

personalNegative.name: Exhaustion
personalNegative.description: Arm and leg stamina recovers 15% slower. Arm and leg stamina is reduced by 10

personalNegative.name: Well That Hurt!
personalNegative.description: All medkit uses consume 25% more resource

personalNegative.name: Incompetent
personalNegative.description: All character skills are leveled 25% slower (Excluding Bolt-action Rifles). All character skills can only be increased up to level 30 (Excluding Crafting)

personalNegative.name: Personality Vacuum
personalNegative.description: Charisma skill cannot be increased. All trader items cost 20% more

personalNegative.name: Dr. Jekyll
personalNegative.description: After gaining the Fresh Wound status, it cannot be removed until the end of the raid

personalNegative.name: Allergic
personalNegative.description: Become allergic to 2 random items from the Provisions or Medication category

personalNegative.name: Broken Secure Container
personalNegative.description: Secure container is restricted to cash, keys, dogtags, special equipment, and certain containers

personalNegative.name: No Flea Market
personalNegative.description: Trading with players on the Flea Market is disabled

personalNegative.name: Third Leg
personalNegative.description: Movement speed is decreased by 1%. Buying items at Therapist is 5% cheaper
